title: Indoor Car Photo Studio Design
skills: 3D DESIGN | 3D Design | 3D Visualization | Architectural Engineering | Electrical Engineering | 3D Modelling | 3D Rendering | 3D Animation | CAD/CAM
full_description:
I’m putting together a dedicated indoor studio built exclusively for photographing cars and need an engineer who can translate my vision into a workable plan. The space must centre on a smooth, motor-driven turntable for seamless 360-degree shots and a purpose-built lighting system that lets us achieve uniform, reflection-controlled illumination from every angle. 

Your task is to develop a full project dossier covering spatial layout, structural and electrical requirements, equipment specifications, and integration details for both the turntable and the bespoke lighting grid. Please factor in load capacities for vehicles up to standard passenger-car weight, ceiling rigging points for softboxes or LED panels, power distribution, ventilation, and a clean cyclorama finish. I also need guidance on recommended brands or component benchmarks where relevant, as well as any compliance notes that affect installation or safety.

Deliverables I expect:
• Scaled layout drawings and 3-D visualisations showing vehicle flow, turntable placement, and lighting positions 
• Complete bill of materials with model numbers or equivalent specs for the turntable, lighting fixtures, control systems, and ancillary gear 
• Electrical and structural load calculations with annotated diagrams 
• A step-by-step installation and commissioning plan, including testing procedures for the 360-turntable and lighting calibration 
• Maintenance and operational guidelines once the studio is live 

I’m open to suggestions that refine the concept, provided we stay focused on an indoor setup aimed at cars, the 360-turntable, and advanced lighting as the cornerstone features. If you have prior experience designing automotive or product-photography studios, especially those featuring rotating platforms, I’d love to see examples and hear how you would approach this build.

title: STM32/ESP32 OTA Bootloader Development
skills: C PROGRAMMING | C Programming | Documentation | Electronics | Embedded Software | Embedded Systems | Microcontroller | MQTT
full_description:
Need Embedded Firmware Developer for STM32/ESP32 OTA Bootloader Project

I need an experienced embedded systems developer to help build and/or complete a firmware update solution for an embedded product.

Project Requirements:

* MCU: STM32F765ZG
* Secondary controller: ESP32
* Communication between ESP32 and STM32 via UART
* OTA firmware delivery via MQTT and/or HTTPS
* ESP32 receives firmware from server/cloud and transfers it to STM32 bootloader
* STM32 bootloader should:
 * Receive firmware over UART
 * Validate firmware integrity (CRC/checksum)
 * Store firmware safely in flash
 * Support bootloader + application memory separation
 * Jump to application after successful update
 * Handle failed/incomplete update recovery
 * Support dual-slot or safe update architecture (preferred)

Expected Deliverables:

* Complete working bootloader source code
* STM32 firmware update protocol implementation
* ESP32 firmware transfer implementation
* Flash memory layout / linker configuration
* Documentation explaining firmware update flow
* Testing/debug support

Skills Required:

* Embedded C / C++
* STM32 HAL / STM32CubeIDE / IAR
* ESP-IDF
* UART communication
* Bootloader development
* OTA firmware systems
* MQTT / HTTPS
* CRC / flash memory handling

Please include in your proposal:

* Similar bootloader/OTA projects you’ve completed
* Experience with STM32 + ESP32 systems
* Estimated timeline and budget
description_snippet: Need Embedded Firmware Developer for STM32/ESP32 OTA Bootloader Project I need an experienced embedded systems developer to help build and/or complete a firmware update solution for an embedded product. Project Requirements: * MCU: STM32F765ZG * Seco

title: Performance Marketing for Health Supplements across Meta
skills: DIGITAL MARKETING | Digital Marketing | Facebook Ads | Instagram Marketing | Data Analysis | Meta Pixel | Visual Design | Google Canvas | Adobe Flash
full_description:
Our organization is seeking a data-driven, highly proficient Performance Marketing Agency to manage, optimize, and execute our paid advertising campaigns across the Meta ecosystem (Facebook, Instagram, and WhatsApp).
We specialize in food supplements and healthcare products marketed to an international audience. Due to the sensitive and highly regulated nature of the health and wellness sector across different global regions, we require an agency partner with deep experience in navigating strict compliance landscapes.
While our internal team will spearhead and provide the core creative assets and foundational strategies, we require an agency partner to stress-test our plans, handle tactical international media buying, optimize cost efficiencies, and meticulously safeguard our ad accounts from policy restrictions.

2. Scope of Work & Key Responsibilities
The selected agency will be responsible for the technical deployment, algorithmic optimization, and strict policy management of our Meta Ads ecosystem.
Strategy Finalization & Media Buying: Review and stress-test internally generated strategies. Provide data-backed recommendations on budget allocation, international targeting, and cross-border funnel architecture.
Campaign Execution: End-to-end setup, structuring, tracking, and execution of campaigns across Facebook, Instagram, and WhatsApp, optimized for international regions.
Conversion Tracking & Data Infrastructure: Ongoing maintenance and optimization of Meta Pixel, Conversions API (CAPI), and offline event tracking to ensure data accuracy across different country domains.
Hyper-Strict Policy Compliance & Risk Mitigation: Proactively audit all ad setups, ad copy, visual hooks, and landing pages. The agency must ensure flawless adherence to Meta’s policies regarding Health, Wellness, Supplements, and Medical claims, preventing ad rejections, Business Manager restrictions, or permanent account bans.

3. Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) & Goals
The agency will be evaluated on their ability to move the needle on the following key metrics across our target international markets:
Metric
Target Objective
CPR (Cost Per Result)
Primary Focus: Systematic reduction through international audience refinement, placement optimization, and algorithmic maturation.
ATR (Action Taker Rate)
Improve the efficiency of international users moving from ad impressions and clicks to concrete actions.
Impressions & Reach
Maximize visibility and ad delivery efficiency within specified target geographies without increasing ad fatigue.
Conversion Rate (CVR)
Drive higher bottom-of-funnel actions (purchases, leads, or WhatsApp consultations) across localized markets.


4. Sector-Specific Challenges & Expectations
A. Meta Compliance for Healthcare & Supplements
The health and supplement niche faces intense scrutiny from Meta’s automated compliance bots. The agency must have a proven track record of navigating restrictions regarding:
"Before and After" imagery or unrealistic body/health expectations.
Implied or explicit disease-curing claims.
Misleading health/dietary statements.
B. International Nuances
Operating in international markets requires an understanding of cross-border localization, managing WhatsApp infrastructure globally, and understanding regional ad delivery behavior.

5. Operational & Partnership Structure
To ensure a seamless workflow, the operational dynamics will be structured as follows:
Creative & Ideation (Internal Team): We will provide the creative angles, copy variations, hooks, and overall strategic vision for our supplement and healthcare lines.
Media Buying & Technical Optimization (Agency): The agency will handle structure, campaign configurations, international target testing, scaling mechanics, and technical feedback on what creative formats are algorithmically performing best.
Meta Compliance Assurance: The agency must serve as our first line of defense against Meta policy violations, ensuring a zero-ban, zero-restriction track record despite the high-risk nature of the healthcare niche.
description_snippet: Our organization is seeking a data-driven, highly proficient Performance Marketing Agency to manage, optimize, and execute our paid advertising campaigns across the Meta ecosystem (Facebook, Instagram, and WhatsApp). We specialize in food supplements

title: Geomagic Elephant STEP Conversion

full_description:
I’m providing a high-resolution mesh of an elephant in max file and other files and need it transformed into a single, watertight STEP solid via reverse-engineering in Geomagic Design. The finished file must retain the original proportions, surface texture cues, and overall anatomical accuracy so it can head straight to 3D printing with no visible distortion or faceting.

Deliverables
• Native Geomagic Design project file showing the reconstruction history 
• Final STEP (.step/.stp) solid, validated as manifold and error-free 
• Snapshot or brief report confirming tolerance checks and that all key textures and features were preserved 
• The updated mesh or comparison overlay illustrating fidelity between source and solid

Acceptance criteria
– All limbs, tusks, ears, and skin folds match the supplied mesh within acceptable print tolerance (±0.2 mm). 
– No hollow shells, self-intersections, or non-manifold edges remain. 
– File imports into common slicers without repair. 

If questions arise about intended wall thickness or printable orientation, let me know early so we can lock those details before you finalize the STEP.

Water systems matter too, so include WTP and STP visuals with believable water-flow animation.

Open and close with cinematic aerial shots, crisp labels and concise callouts so even non-engineers grasp the scale and strategic value. A small set of high-resolution stills of the plant and surroundings will round out the package.

Key deliverables
• Fully textured, geo-referenced 3D site model 
• Seamless fly-through/over animation covering all plant areas and infrastructure links 
• Water-flow, gas-flow and power-flow animated sequences 
• Cinematic intro & outro with titles, labels and callouts 
• 4–6 polished 3D still renders suitable for print and web

Please tell me:
• A link to past work that proves you can achieve this quality (show me your best!)

title: Equity Partner Wanted - Junior Developer (USA / Europe) - Live Sports + AI Mobile App
skills: REACT NATIVE | React Native | Node.js | Git | 3D Animation | Android | iPhone | Animation | Unity 3D | Mobile App Development | Web Development
full_description:
Type: Partnership / Equity only (NOT paid hourly — please read fully before bidding)
Commitment: Part-time, flexible hours
Location: USA or Europe only

ABOUT THE PROJECT
We're building a mobile app (iOS + Android) that pairs live football matches with an AI-driven 3D anime character who provides real-time spoken commentary. Think of it as a companion who watches the match with you, reacts emotionally to every goal and red card, and chats with you about what's happening — all powered by live match data and modern AI.

The product is already built and functional. We have:
- A working React Native mobile app
- A Node.js / TypeScript backend
- A web admin dashboard (Vite + React)
- Integrated LLM commentary, ElevenLabs TTS, Whisper STT, and LiveKit real-time audio
- A 3D rigged anime avatar with mouth-sync, facial expressions, and emotional reactions
- Live football data across 13 major European, American, and international competitions
- Native in-app purchases (iOS + Android) with a credits-based economy
- Predictions, chat, voice interaction, and a polished UI

We're heading into a major peak window in mid-2026 tied to the World Cup, and we need a hands-on partner to help us push it across the finish line and scale.

WHAT YOU'D BE DOING
- Fixing bugs, polishing UI, improving stability
- Helping ship updates to TestFlight / Play Store
- Tuning real-time voice latency and the avatar pipeline
- Small backend tasks (REST endpoints, webhook handling, data ingestion)
- Whatever needs doing — small team, hands dirty

WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR
- Junior level is perfectly fine — you don't need to be senior, but you must be coachable, reliable, and genuinely interested
- Some experience with React Native OR Node.js / TypeScript (one is enough)
- Comfortable with Git / GitHub
- Located in USA or Europe (we need overlapping working hours)
- English communication
- Passionate about football, AI, or anime — bonus if all three
- Self-driven: this is a partnership, not a job; nobody will micromanage you

WHAT THIS IS NOT
- Not a paid contract — no hourly rate, no fixed fee
- Not full-time — you keep your day job / studies
- Not a "work for free and maybe get paid" trap — we'll sign a written partnership/equity agreement
- Not for agencies — individuals only

WHAT YOU GET
- Equity / revenue share in the project (terms negotiated based on contribution)
- Real ownership in a launched product entering a huge market window
- Hands-on experience with a modern AI + real-time stack (LiveKit, ElevenLabs, Whisper, LLM orchestration, React Native, IAP)
- A small, focused team where your work ships immediately

HOW TO APPLY
Please include:
1. A short intro — who you are, where you're based, and why this project interests you
2. Your GitHub or any code samples (small personal projects are totally fine)
3. Confirmation that you understand this is an equity / partnership role, not paid work
4. Roughly how many hours per week you can realistically commit

Bids without these will be ignored. Looking forward to meeting future partners.

title: Full-Scope Tally Bookkeeping
skills: BANK RECONCILIATION | Bank Reconciliation | Financial Analysis | Data Entry | PDF | Accounting | Intuit QuickBooks | Bookkeeping | Excel
full_description:
I’m looking for a seasoned bookkeeper who works comfortably in Tally and can take over the entire back-office accounting cycle for my business.

The work covers every routine task—entering and coding payables, posting receivables, reconciling multiple bank and card accounts, drafting monthly financial statements, and wrapping up the books at year-end for a clean “final accounting.” Accuracy and timeliness are essential; I rely on these numbers for cash-flow decisions.

Deliverables
• Daily/weekly posting of all AP & AR transactions in Tally 
• End-of-month bank and credit-card reconciliations with supporting schedules 
• Monthly P&L, Balance Sheet, and Cash-Flow Statement exported from Tally (PDF & Excel) 
• Year-end close with adjusting entries and a summary hand-over note

I’ll provide remote access to the current Tally data file, source documents, and a short orientation on our chart of accounts. Please highlight your Tally experience, estimated turnaround times for each cycle, and any questions you need answered before we start.

title: Bulk WhatsApp Campaign Strategy
skills: DIGITAL MARKETING | Digital Marketing | Email Marketing | Social Media Marketing | Content Creation | Sales | Marketing | Internet Marketing | Business Writing
full_description:
I have a clean list of about 100,000 Indian phone numbers and I’m ready to introduce a new physical product to them through WhatsApp. The goal is straightforward: promote the product in a professional, formal tone without tripping any spam filters and while remaining fully compliant with WhatsApp policies. 

I need a marketer who can take ownership of everything from concept to delivery—refining the core offer, crafting a formally worded template, guiding it through template approval (WhatsApp Business API), segmenting the list, scheduling batches, and monitoring performance in real time. Hands-on experience with bulk-messaging platforms such as WhatsApp Business API, Twilio, WATI, Gupshup, or similar is a must so we stay within platform limits and still reach the whole audience quickly. 

Deliverables 
• One formally written, pre-approved WhatsApp message template promoting the product 
• A sending plan that spells out batching, timing, opt-out language, and compliance steps 
• Execution of the broadcast to the full 100,000-number list 
• Post-campaign report covering sent, delivered, read rates, and user replies 

If you’ve managed large-scale WhatsApp promotions before—especially for physical products—let me know the tools you used and the delivery or engagement metrics you achieved. I’m open to creative ideas that keep us compliant yet maximize reach and response.

title: Embedded Systems Research Assistant – Assistive Technology Project
skills: EMBEDDED SYSTEMS | Embedded Systems | MATLAB | Microcontroller | Arduino | Electrical Engineering | Electronics | I2C | Data Collection | Simulation | Data Analysis
full_description:
I am seeking a motivated Embedded Systems Research Assistant to support the development, simulation, and experimental validation of a low-cost electronic assistive subsystem for blind and visually impaired users. The project focuses on electronics-level performance, including power consumption, response latency, communication reliability, and system efficiency.

The work will involve MATLAB/Simulink modelling, ESP32-based hardware setup, sensor interfacing, audio/haptic feedback systems, and bench-level experimental validation.

The successful candidate will:
- Develop and test MATLAB/Simulink models for an embedded assistive system.
- Support the design of an ESP32-based prototype using sensors, communication modules, and feedback devices.
- Model system operating modes such as idle, sensing, processing, communication, and feedback.
- Measure power consumption, latency, response time, and communication reliability.
- Assist with experimental validation using bench-level hardware.
- Compare simulation results with real hardware measurements.
- Prepare plots, tables, technical notes, and documentation for project reporting.
-Support troubleshooting of embedded circuits, sensor communication, and data logging.

Required Skills and Experience
- Embedded systems and microcontroller-based design.
- ESP32, Arduino, or similar development boards.
- MATLAB and Simulink modelling.
- I2C, I2S, UART, BLE, or Wi-Fi communication.
- Basic electronic circuit design and testing.
- Sensor interfacing, especially IMU or distance sensors.
- Data collection, analysis, and performance evaluation.
- Power measurement and latency testing.

The Research Assistant will contribute to:

- A MATLAB/Simulink model of the assistive subsystem.
- Power consumption and latency measurement results.
- Simulation versus experimental comparison.
- Design recommendations for low-cost assistive electronics.
- Supporting documentation for the final research report.

This role is suitable for an engineering student, graduate, or early-career researcher with strong interest in embedded systems, electronics, assistive technology, and simulation-based design. The ideal candidate should be practical, detail-oriented, and comfortable working with both software models and physical hardware.
description_snippet: I am seeking a motivated Embedded Systems Research Assistant to support the development, simulation, and experimental validation of a low-cost electronic assistive subsystem for blind and visually impaired users. The project focuses on electronics-le

title: Live TikTok Business Setup Coaching
skills: SOCIAL MEDIA MARKETING | Social Media Marketing | Shopify | Digital Marketing | Social Media Management | Business Coaching | Marketing Strategy | Analytics | Content Creation
full_description:
I’m looking for someone who can jump on a voice call with screen-sharing right away and walk me step-by-step through setting up three separate TikTok Business accounts. By the end of the session I want every account fully functional and ready to launch campaigns.

Here’s what we’ll cover while we’re on the call:

• Create or verify each Business Center and Ads Manager account 
• Install and test the TikTok Pixel so it fires correctly on my Shopify store 
• Link Shopify to each ad account and confirm catalogue syncing 
• Navigate the different sections inside Business Center vs. Ads Manager so I know where everything lives 
• Build at least one sample campaign, focusing on Ad Campaign Setup and Management (that’s the area I most want to master) 

All creative assets are already prepared, so we can concentrate entirely on the technical configuration and best-practice workflow. I’m familiar with other ad platforms, but I need this hands-on walkthrough to understand TikTok’s unique structure, terminology and levers.

You should be comfortable sharing your screen, explaining as you go, and answering quick questions in real time. The session starts as soon as you’re available, and we’ll finish when all three accounts are connected, the pixel events are verified, and I feel confident launching an ad on my own.

title: Documentary Channel Intro & Logo Animation
skills: LOGO DESIGN | Logo Design | 2D Animation | Sound Design | Video Production | Animation | After Effects | 3D Animation | Video Editing | Motion Graphics | Graphic Design
full_description:
VAST ! Intro & Logo Animation


Hello,

I need two short motion graphics intros for my English documentary YouTube channel called VAST !

Channel name: VAST !
Handle: @vastindex
Logo Font:Inter Black
Instagram / TikTok: @vastindex
Main logo color: FF5900

VAST is a premium English-language documentary channel focused on real stories, untold histories, forgotten events, science, space, disasters, investigations, unsolved cases, unusual human stories, and events that shaped the world.

The tone should feel:

serious, cinematic, modern, investigative, intelligent, minimal, and premium.

Please avoid anything that feels like:

gaming intro, flashy neon, cheap glitch effects, overdramatic trailer style, loud YouTuber intro, cartoonish animation, excessive particles, or too much movement.

The intro should feel suitable for a documentary channel, not a gaming or entertainment channel.

⸻

Deliverables

I need two separate versions:

1. Transparent Logo Animation

A short logo animation that can be placed inside the video, over existing footage.

Length: 3–5 seconds
Background: Transparent
Format: MOV with alpha channel / ProRes 4444 preferred
Usage: To place in the middle of documentary videos as a subtle branded logo animation.

This version should be clean and minimal. It should not cover too much of the screen or distract from the video.

The logo can appear with a subtle cinematic motion, soft reveal, slight light movement, or elegant fade. The animation should feel premium and controlled.

⸻

2. Full Channel Intro

A short intro that summarizes the identity of the channel.

Length: maximum 5–10 seconds
Format: 4K and 1080p versions preferred
Style: Cinematic documentary intro
Usage: To use at the beginning of selected VAST videos.

The intro may include visual elements that represent:

* real stories
* history
* science
* space
* disasters
* investigations
* unsolved cases
* archives
* maps
* documents
* mysterious but factual stories

Possible visual language:

* dark cinematic background
* subtle archive textures
* maps / coordinates / document details
* soft camera movement
* minimal data or investigation-style elements
* controlled orange accent using #FF5900
* elegant logo reveal

The intro should end with:

VAST !

Optionally, very subtly:

@vastindex

But the main focus should be the logo and the channel name.

⸻

Important Style Direction

The intro should feel like it belongs to a serious documentary brand.

References in tone:

* modern documentary opening
* investigation documentary graphics
* premium YouTube documentary channel
* subtle cinematic logo reveal
* archive / mystery / global story atmosphere

The animation should create curiosity, but it should not feel like conspiracy content.

It should feel reliable, intelligent, and clean.

⸻

Sound Design

Please include subtle sound design if possible.

Preferred sound direction:

* soft cinematic hit
* low-frequency impact
* subtle whoosh
* clean documentary-style sound
* no loud gaming sounds
* no aggressive trailer boom
* no overused YouTube intro sounds

The sound should support the intro, not overpower it.

⸻

Files Needed

Please deliver:

* Final video files
* Transparent logo animation file with alpha channel
* 4K version if possible
* 1080p version
* Source project file if possible
* Font information if any font is used
* Version without sound if possible
* Version with sound if possible

⸻

Main Goal

The goal is to create a short, premium, memorable identity for VAST.

The viewer should feel:

“This is a serious, well-researched documentary channel.”

Not loud.
Not childish.
Not flashy.
Not gaming-style.

Clean, dark, cinematic, minimal, and trustworthy.
description_snippet: VAST ! Intro & Logo Animation Hello, I need two short motion graphics intros for my English documentary YouTube channel called VAST ! Channel name: VAST ! Handle: @vastindex Logo Font:Inter Black Instagram / TikTok: @vastindex Main logo color: FF5900
